title: Molten Floral Portuguese Buckwheat Flatbread
description: A fluffy buckwheat flatbread with a molten honey butter center, topped with sashimi‑cut cucumber and fragrant lemon zest for a post‑workout boost.
instructions: Whisk buckwheat flour, baking powder and sea salt in a bowl.
Whisk oat milk, olive oil, Greek yogurt and whey protein isolate until smooth.
Combine wet and dry ingredients, stir until no lumps remain.
Cover the batter and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium heat and spray with cooking spray.
Pour 1/4 cup of batter into the skillet and spread into a thin circle.
Cook until bubbles form on the surface, about 2 minutes.
Flip, spoon melted butter and honey into the center, then place a thin slice of cucumber on top, cook another minute.
Remove from skillet, let it cool slightly, then slice into wedges and serve immediately.
